elements.label: Description
elements.value: Second largest. Extremely rare achievement. Merges into the legendary Watermelon.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/melon.schema.json, set ct_melon_radius to {{ct_melon_radius}}]
Set Melon radius to {{ct_melon_radius}} pixels.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/melon.schema.json, set ct_melon_score to {{ct_melon_score}}]
Set Melon merge score to {{ct_melon_score}} points.
